resource.description: Latest weekly price row for a Stock Trends symbol, including adjusted close, weekly high/low, volume (actual shares traded), trades, and price change.

Latest Stock Trends Inference Model (ST-IM) outputs for a symbol: forward return expectations and statistical distributions across 4-week, 13-week, and 40-week horizons. Use /v1/meta/stim for ST-IM provenance, base-period context, and interpretation limits.
Historical weekly price series for a Stock Trends symbol.

resources.description: BTC crypto price, market cap, 24h volume, and % change (1h/24h/7d). 1,000+ coins supported. $0.002 USDC per call.

accepts.description: BTC crypto price, market cap, 24h volume, and % change (1h/24h/7d). 1,000+ coins supported. $0.002 USDC per call.

resources.description: CuseTheJuice agent APIs on Base USDC: email relay, spam and phishing checks, IP threat scoring, Base Notary hash anchors, and Jupiter Solana swap quotes. Spam/phishing from From, Reply-To, Subject only (no body). GET/POST headers, optional mode. JSON rules/signals; optional X-CTJ-Spam-Check header. Pay with x402 (Base USDC). HTTP shape: extensions.bazaar on the 402. Catalog: https://app.cusethejuice.com/agents

accepts.description: CuseTheJuice agent APIs on Base USDC: email relay, spam and phishing checks, IP threat scoring, Base Notary hash anchors, and Jupiter Solana swap quotes. Spam/phishing from From, Reply-To, Subject only (no body). GET/POST headers, optional mode. JSON rules/signals; optional X-CTJ-Spam-Check header. Pay with x402 (Base USDC). HTTP shape: extensions.bazaar on the 402. Catalog: https://app.cusethejuice.com/agents

resource.description: Latest Stock Trends indicator snapshot for a symbol. Stock Trends indicators are part of a multi-decade classification framework with records extending back to 1980. Their value comes from consistent semantics across market history: trend state, trend persistence, relative performance, relative performance direction, and volume activity are encoded in a stable doctrine designed for longitudinal research.

resources.description: Create a Browserbase browser session with prepaid time. Returns a WebSocket connection URL for browser automation.

accepts.description: Create a Browserbase browser session with prepaid time. Returns a WebSocket connection URL for browser automation.

estimatedMinutes.description: Estimated number of minutes you plan to use the browser session

accepts.description: Create a Browserbase browser session with prepaid time. Returns a WebSocket connection URL for browser automation.

estimatedMinutes.description: Estimated number of minutes you plan to use the browser session

resource.description: Current market regime classification derived from the distribution of Stock Trends trend codes across active signals.
Deterministic symbol-level decision evaluation combining Stock Trends signal context with market regime context.
Evaluates a user-supplied portfolio against Stock Trends signal and market regime context.
Latest Stock Trends leadership summary identifying overall, sector, and industry-group leaders using relative performance and trend-alignment filters.
Latest sector, industry-group, or industry breadth snapshot derived from Stock Trends signal distribution.
Historical ST-IM forward return distribution series for a symbol. Use /v1/meta/stim for ST-IM provenance, base-period context, and interpretation limits.
Historical sector, industry-group, or industry breadth series derived from Stock Trends signal distribution.
Historical sector leadership rotation derived from Stock Trends trend distribution, relative performance, and trend maturity measures.
Deterministic forward regime outlook derived from recent weekly regime score direction and consistency.

resources.name: CDP Facilitator
resources.description: Best-in-class x402 facilitator. Fee-free USDC settlement on Base Mainnet. KYT/OFAC checks on every transaction.

resources.name: Corbits
resources.description: A production grade facilitator which supports multi-network, multi-token, multi-payment schemes.

resources.name: Mogami facilitator
resources.description: A free, developer-focused, production-ready facilitator for x402 payments. Use it instantly online, or launch your own Docker image in seconds.

resources.name: OpenX402.ai Facilitator
resources.description: The first permissionless, gasless and omnichain x402 facilitator that any x402 server can use without login

resources.name: PayAI Facilitator
resources.description: Accept x402 payments on all networks including Avalanche, Base, Polygon, Sei, Solana, and more! Get started in less than 1 minute. Supports all tokens. No API Keys required.

resources.name: Treasure Facilitator
resources.description: Treasure x402 Facilitator available on Base and Base Sepolia. Supports EIP-3009 compliant tokens including USDC, MAGIC, SMOL, MIO, AI Frens tokens, and more.

resources.name: WorldFun Facilitator
resources.description: AWE World.fun’s x402 Facilitator enables fee-free EIP-3009 payments in USDC and other ERC-20 tokens, handling verification and settlement on Base so developers don’t need blockchain infrastructure.

resources.name: x402.rs Facilitator
resources.description: Independent, open-source facilitator in Rust. Easy to self-host, extend to new networks, or use via our hosted instance.
